title: Boussingaultia brachystachya
taxonomy: Boussingaultia brachystachya belongs to the family Amaranthaceae and is classified as a species of flowering plant. It is native to South America, specifically in the western regions of the continent. This plant is an annual or perennial herb, with a variety of growth habits. The classification of Boussingaultia brachystachya is further divided into the genus Boussingaultia and the species B. brachystachya. As a member of the Amaranthaceae family, Boussingaultia brachystachya is closely related to other plants such as amaranth and pigweed.
